issues_found: event_type is set to 'unknown' which is not a valid taxonomy value; given the source content, no valid event_type applies as this is not a research document

human_review_reason: The source is a pure navigation/index page that should be rejected per rule 5, but the generated record has already correctly identified this issue. Human review needed to confirm the rejection and note that individual survey pages (Beige Book, Manufacturing BOS, etc.) would be better archival candidates.

corrected_fields.summary: This page is a directory/index of the Philadelphia Fed's regional economic data products, linking to surveys and datasets covering the Third District (PA, NJ, DE). It contains no substantive research findings, policy signals, or macro analysis. Most recent survey update dates visible are March 2026 for Manufacturing and Nonmanufacturing Business Outlook Surveys.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This is a navigation hub, not a research archive entry. It has no direct market or macro relevance. The individual surveys it links to (Beige Book, manufacturing survey, etc.) would be candidates for archiving, but this page itself contains no actionable information.
